welcome.title: Divina Palabra
welcome.subtitle: Bible Edition
welcome.purpose_content: "Divina Palabra" (Divine Word) is an educational tool designed to strengthen community bond, classroom teaching, and Bible study. It offers a dynamic resource for families, churches, schools, and study groups to connect with the Scriptures in a modern, accessible, and edifying way for all ages. Perfect for beginners in faith or those looking to deepen their biblical knowledge.
welcome.disclaimer: The biblical texts used correspond to the official selected versions. For the correct functionality of the challenges (such as omitting accents, capitalization, or punctuation), strictly formal adjustments are made, without altering their message or doctrinal content.

setup.title: Activity Setup
setup.practice_mode: Devotional Mode (No time limit or limits)

game.title: Activity
game.restart_title: What do you want to restart?
game.restart_desc: You can restart only the current activity to try again, or return to the main menu to start a new activity.
game.correct_option: Excellent! Counsel aligned with the Scriptures.
game.wrong_option: This approach may not be biblical. Try again!

classroom.title: Educator Panel
classroom.description: Create a custom Bible task or lesson for your students. A link will be generated that you can share via WhatsApp. Once completed, the student will send their answers and reflections back to you.
classroom.reflection_placeholder: e.g. How would you apply this passage to your daily life?
classroom.student_reflection_label: Write your reflection on this lesson:
classroom.student_reflection_placeholder: Write here what you have learned or understood from the text...
classroom.whatsapp_message_template: Hello teacher, I completed the lesson "{lesson}". Score: {score}. Reflection: {reflection}

onboarding.slide1_desc: An interactive tool designed to connect with the Holy Scriptures in a practical and modern way, strengthening personal, family, or classroom Bible study.
onboarding.slide2_desc: Participate in three types of Bible challenges: unscramble mixed words, fill in blank spaces in key verses, and reveal Bible quotes letter by letter.
onboarding.slide3_desc: Teachers can design customized lessons, share task links, and receive their students' answers and reflections directly via WhatsApp.

summary.verse_log_desc: Passages you interacted with during this session. We invite you to remember and look them up in your Bible!
